paragraphs: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years building high-performance web applications and design systems at scale. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS — with a strong eye for UI/UX and accessibility.

Previously led frontend architecture at a Series B SaaS startup, reducing bundle size by 40% and improving Lighthouse scores across the board. Comfortable working closely with design, product, and backend teams to deliver polished, production-grade experiences.

points: Lead development of the merchant dashboard, serving 500K+ businesses with complex data visualizations and real-time payment analytics.
Architect and maintain a shared component library used across 8 product teams, improving consistency and reducing duplicate code.
Collaborate with design and product teams to define component APIs and interaction patterns.
Mentor 3 junior engineers through code reviews, pair programming, and technical design sessions.
Built and shipped the mutual funds discovery and investment flow, contributing to a 25% increase in first-time investors.
Implemented micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation, enabling independent deployments across squads.
Optimized core web vitals — improved LCP by 35% and reduced CLS to near-zero on key landing pages.
Wrote end-to-end and unit tests using Cypress and Jest, achieving 80%+ coverage on critical flows.
Developed event platform features including ticketing, scheduling, and speaker management used by 50K+ attendees annually.
Migrated legacy jQuery codebase to Vue.js, improving maintainability and developer experience.
Collaborated directly with founders on product design and user research.
Built responsive UI components for the student onboarding flow, improving mobile conversion by 18%.
Fixed cross-browser compatibility issues and improved accessibility across key pages.
